author: Marisol Chen
quote: Riley asks the questions most agents stop asking after their first year. The slow approach is rare and clients notice.

author: A. and J.
quote: We walked through pricing strategy together and came out understanding why the comps said what they said. Worth the two hours.

author: Devon P.
relation: Friend who pestered Riley into getting licensed
quote: Spent four years asking Riley about every house I looked at. Glad I finally have to pay for it.

author: Hannah W.
quote: Sends clients to me already prepared. Pre-approval conversations are 30 minutes instead of 90 because Riley walks them through the basics first.
